metadata.title: Spotify Link
metadata.description: Include the song you're currently listening to in your note.

regex.source:
Notice(
          "[WARN] Spotify Link Plugin: The provided template looks like a path, if so, the file hasn't been found.",
          1e4
        )
regex.target:
Notice(
          "[错误] Spotify链接插件: 提供的模板看起来像一个路径，如果是这样，文件未找到。",
          1e4
        )
Notice("[错误] Spotify链接插件: " + e.message, 1e4)

regex.source: Notice("Spotify Link Plugin: track or episode overwritten.")
regex.target: Notice("Spotify链接插件: 曲目或剧集已被覆盖。")

regex.source: Notice("Spotify Link Plugin: Connected to Spotify !", 3e3)
regex.target: Notice("Spotify链接插件: 已连接到Spotify！", 3e3)
Notice("[错误] Spotify链接插件: " + e.message, 3e3)
Notice(`Spotify链接插件: 访问已刷新`)

regex.source: Notice("Your spotify link configuration might be outdated.")
regex.target: Notice("您的Spotify链接配置可能已过时。")

regex.source: name: "Create file for currently playing episode using template"
regex.target: name: "使用模板创建当前播放的剧集文件"

regex.source: name: "Create file for currently playing episode"
regex.target: name: "创建当前播放的剧集文件"

regex.source: name: "Create file for currently playing track using template"
regex.target: name: "使用模板创建当前播放的曲目文件"

regex.source: name: "Create file for currently playing track"
regex.target: name: "创建当前播放的曲目文件"

regex.source: name: "Append Spotify currently playing episode using template"
regex.target: name: "使用模板追加当前播放的剧集"

regex.source: name: "Append Spotify currently playing episode with timestamp"
regex.target: name: "追加当前播放的剧集及时间戳"

regex.source: name: "Append Spotify currently playing track using template"
regex.target: name: "使用模板追加当前播放的曲目"

regex.source: name: "Append Spotify currently playing track with timestamp"
regex.target: name: "追加当前播放的曲目及时间戳"

regex.source: text: "Follow the link below to get your Client Id and Client Secret, you need a spotify account to get access."
regex.target: text: "请点击下面的链接获取您的客户端ID和客户端密钥，您需要一个Spotify账户才能访问。"

regex.source: text: "Copy the Client Id and Secret"
text: "Set the Redirect URI to : obsidian://spotify-auth/"
text: "Select the Spotify icon located in Obsidian's left sidebar to connect."
regex.target: text: "选择位于Obsidian左侧边栏的Spotify图标以连接。"

regex.source: text: "NOTICE: The id and secret will be stored unencrypted on your local device. If you sync your data to a public source, the id and secret will be shown as-is."
regex.target: text: "注意：ID和密钥将以未加密的形式存储在您的本地设备上。如果您将数据同步到公共来源，ID和密钥将原样显示。"

regex.source: text: "You have two options to specify a template: 'Inline' or 'Path-based'."
regex.target: text: "您有两种方式来指定模板：'内联'或'基于路径'。"

regex.source: text: "To use the inline method, simply include your template directly."
regex.target: text: "要使用内联方法，只需直接包含您的模板。"

regex.source: text: "For path-based selection, you must reference the Vault. A valid example would be: 'Templates/Spotify/track.md' and the content structure is exactly the same as the inline template."
regex.target: text: "对于基于路径的选择，您必须引用Vault。有效示例为：'Templates/Spotify/track.md'，内容结构与内联模板完全相同。"

regex.source: .setDesc("Overwrite the file if it already exists in the vault.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果文件已存在于Vault中，则覆盖该文件。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Automatically open the newly created file in the active leaf.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在活动叶子中自动打开新创建的文件。")

regex.source: Error("Unable to get the currently playing track.");
regex.target: Error("无法获取当前播放的曲目。");

regex.source: Error("You are not connected to Spotify.");
"Something went wrong, please manually log back to spotify."
regex.target: "出现了问题，请手动重新登录到Spotify。"

regex.source: "The data received is not handle. You can request it by opening a GitHub issue and providing the track URL so that I can adjust the tool accordingly."
regex.target: "接收到的数据无法处理。您可以通过打开GitHub问题并提供曲目URL来请求，以便我可以相应地调整工具。"
